_publications._publicationTitle: mTOR kinase inhibition disrupts neuregulin 1-ERBB3 autocrine signaling and sensitizes NF2-deficient meningioma cellular models to IGF1R inhibition.

_contextSnippet: Immunoblotting revealed NRG1 secretion in 48 h-concentrated medium (48 h-CM) from NF2 (−) AC cells and Ben-Men-1
details: Secretes NRG1 ligand in 48h concentrated medium, activating ERBB3 receptor and downstream mTOR signaling pathways
